config.seed_text: An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

records.reflection_text:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Analyze the following text and do two things:
1. State its strongest recurring ideas in 2-4 short bullet points.
2. Produce a revised continuation that makes those ideas more structurally coherent and more surprising.

TEXT:
An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.
records.output_text:
You could have been inspired by some stories from earlier times or thought them better than this one; you just had to build on what I'm seeing here so far with my book (the second part is actually good news). So let's show how important these 3 steps were for me - we all knew they would turn into something else once again :
(If writing code will allow us both to rewrite other languages)
3.) Write out comments about your thoughts! Don't forget to share at http://www/cancelledfusionblog.org
